summary: Frontend-only E2E testing of Chronicle (local-first IndexedDB knowledge app). Verified all 11 requested scenarios via Playwright against the preview URL. Every scenario passed: 3-column layout, object create+autosave+persistence, manual tags + keyword-fallback suggestions, AI weave (tag/text similarity + navigation), New object dropdown + type filters, Cmd+K search dialog, chat import via paste, AI Pulse rule-based digest, Settings dialog + workspace name persistence across reload, and delete with count decrement. No backend testing performed (per request).

issues: Radix DialogContent used in SearchDialog / ImportChatDialog / PulseDialog / SettingsDialog triggers repeated console warnings 'DialogContent requires a DialogTitle' and 'Missing Description or aria-describedby'. SearchDialog has no DialogTitle at all; the other three have a DialogTitle but no DialogDescription. Wrap the SearchDialog title in VisuallyHidden and add DialogDescription (or aria-describedby={undefined}) to silence the warnings and improve screen-reader a11y. Not blocking any functionality.

action_items: (Optional a11y polish) Add a DialogTitle to SearchDialog (wrap in VisuallyHidden if you want it hidden) and add DialogDescription — or set aria-describedby={undefined} — on all Radix DialogContent instances to silence console warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js: inbox polling runs every 5s in preview and floods the console with ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED. This is EXPECTED per the problem statement (local Node server not present in hosted preview), but consider gating the interval when the last poll fails / the URL is clearly unreachable to reduce console noise for users in preview.

ObjectDetail.jsx `change()` passes stale state to persist(): it spreads the pre-update {title,content,tags,type} then overrides the changed field. Works today because IndexedDB `update` presumably merges patches, but it is a subtle footgun — recommend passing ONLY the changed field: persist({ [field]: value }).
SearchDialog.jsx uses DialogContent without a DialogTitle — accessibility warning in console. Add a hidden title.

Sidebar object-types nav also renders `chat` (nav-chat) in the same list as user-createable types, but the 'New object' dropdown correctly filters `chat` out (created via Import). Consistent, but worth documenting for future maintainers.
seed_data_creation: Test created ephemeral objects in browser IndexedDB during the run (2 notes 'React hooks study' + 'React performance tips', 1 idea, 1 imported chat). One was deleted at end. All data lives only in the automated browser session's IndexedDB and does not affect other users.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 acceptance scenarios pass on the preview URL. ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED on http://127.0.0.1:4577/api/inbox is expected (local extension server not present) and can be ignored. Radix Dialog a11y warnings in console are cosmetic only. Playwright script is inlined in this iteration — not saved to a file since testing is UI-only and the app has no backend suite to regress.
rca of the issue: No issues found requiring RCA. Reported items are minor a11y warnings and a low-risk state-staleness pattern in ObjectDetail.change().
